title: verbena adricana
intro: Verbena adricana, also known as Verbena officinalis, is a perennial plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, known for its small, pink to purple flowers and distinctive fragrance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Verbena adricana include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive disorders, such as nausea and diarrhea. In herbal preparations, Verbena adricana is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in supplements and remedies.
